$comment: MVP insect plates (design §6: observe · sketch · release). A field sketch (one portion) is recorded per observation tick, weighted by rarity; the pity timer lives in economy.json (observation). Nothing is taken — the insect is released; a completed plate (all portions sketched) is a book of rubbings granting a permanent multiplier. Plate lore lives in dialogue.json (insectPlates). habitats = zones with an observation site.
